title: Uniface IDE Editors
text: Uniface IDE Editors Use the Uniface Integrated Development Environment (IDE) to create development objects, and build them into deployable applications. To provide extra work area, especially if you are working with large monitors or dual monitors, you can open a second window. Related Links Using the Uniface IDE Use the Uniface IDE to develop an application, following the Uniface development paradigm of Model, Construct, Build, and Deploy. Working with Development Objects Although development objects can be quite different in content and purpose, the way you create, edit and delete them in the Uniface IDE is essentially the same.
